ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s ecosystem growth, with record inflows into ETFs and a surge in tokenized equities and stablecoin supply. Regulatory and cultural developments are also drawing focus.
ctxTalking:
• Backpack US adds former SEC Acting Chairman Piwowar to its board as it pursues crypto perpetuals
• Concerns over extreme stunts tied to memecoin promotions, particularly around Pump.fun’s latest campaigns
• Solana ecosystem reports all-time highs in tokenized real-world assets and stablecoin supply
ctxMatters: Regulatory expertise on crypto company boards may influence product development and compliance strategies. The memecoin craze is prompting debate about the boundaries of marketing and user safety. Solana’s ecosystem metrics highlight ongoing institutional and retail engagement.
ctxSignal:
Signal: High-profile regulatory appointments and ecosystem growth metrics reflect strategic shifts and adoption trends.
Noise: Sensational coverage of memecoin-related stunts may distract from substantive ecosystem developments.
ctxGlossary:
Perpetuals — Crypto derivatives that allow trading without an expiry date
Tokenized equities — Shares of companies represented as tokens on a blockchain

readMore.title: Backpack US appoints former SEC Acting Chairman Piwowar to board amid push for crypto perps
